name: Serathis

sheet.name: Serathis
sheet.background_story:
Serathis was originally a disciple of Logun, and student of the Druids. Though, eventually he found his own path to a more potent form of power.

As his interest gradually shifted towards The Nameless Serpent, he beset upon a quest driven by his growing fascination. As intrigue turned to worship, he began to unlock the power of transmutation.

Serathis is now in the midst of transforming into a wormlord, driven by his dedication to the Nameless Serpent and a devotion to Kuul.

description:
Serathis was originally a disciple of Logun, and student of the Druids. Though, eventually he found his own path to a more potent form of power.

As his interest gradually shifted towards The Nameless Serpent, he beset upon a quest driven by his growing fascination. As intrigue turned to worship, he began to unlock the power of transmutation.

Serathis is now in the midst of transforming into a wormlord, driven by his dedication to the Nameless Serpent and a devotion to Kuul.
